title: Nay's Enhanced Aether
description: An Aether heavy focused Modpack made for Fabric 1.21.1
body:
Nay's Enhanced Aether is a modpack fully based arround upgrading the whole Aether experience.

It is the Third Modpack of the "Nay's Enhanced" Series.

It mainly focuses on adding more biomes and stuctures to the whole dimension to improve it.

The main goal is to make the Aether Experience even more complete as well as adding onto what could be this modded dimension.

It also adds other content to improve vanilla but those are more Quality of Life mods than full on add-ons to the modpack.

Here are some in game screenshots to showcase more of the modpack :


![Enhanced Aether - 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b3b76f3ad36f7e0370a311bb62a80f25ef19769.jpeg)

![Enhanced Aether - 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d408da768cac78adbeaa970799d9f2c6615b4695.jpeg)

![Enhanced Aether - 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e77ff08ba54e33009564734a6f1b8efff23e26.jpeg)

![Enhanced Aether - 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae95c2978962146ff41c9a642afca0b1abfc473a.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
